description.en: Learn Solana program development with Anchor — accounts, instructions, and PDAs from the ground up.
description.pt: Aprenda desenvolvimento de programas Solana com Anchor — contas, instruções e PDAs do zero.
description.es: Aprende desarrollo de programas Solana con Anchor — cuentas, instrucciones y PDAs desde cero.

title: Solana Accounts
description: Every piece of state on Solana lives in an account. Accounts store lamports (SOL), raw data bytes, and a reference to the program that owns them. Complete the function below to extract the key fields from an account object.
content:
Every piece of state on Solana lives in an account. Accounts store lamports (SOL), raw data bytes, and a reference to the program that owns them. Complete the function below to extract the key fields from an account object.

Hint 1: An account object has: `lamports` (number), `owner` (PublicKey), `data` (Buffer), `executable` (boolean).
Hint 2: Call `.toBase58()` on a PublicKey to get its string representation.
Hint 3: The data length is `account.data.length` — no parsing needed for this exercise.

tests.name: challenge

title: Instructions and Transactions
description: A Solana transaction contains one or more instructions. Each instruction targets a program, passes accounts, and provides instruction data. Implement a helper that describes a SOL transfer instruction.
content:
A Solana transaction contains one or more instructions. Each instruction targets a program, passes accounts, and provides instruction data. Implement a helper that describes a SOL transfer instruction.

Hint 1: A transfer instruction needs: `fromPubkey`, `toPubkey`, and `lamports`.
Hint 2: Convert PublicKey to string with `.toBase58()` before returning.
Hint 3: The System Program ID is `11111111111111111111111111111111` — it owns all transfer instructions.

tests.name: challenge

title: Program Derived Addresses (PDAs)
description: PDAs are deterministic addresses derived from a program ID and seeds. Unlike regular keypairs, PDAs have no private key — only the program can sign for them. Implement a function that describes the seeds needed to derive a PDA for an enrollment account.
content:
PDAs are deterministic addresses derived from a program ID and seeds. Unlike regular keypairs, PDAs have no private key — only the program can sign for them. Implement a function that describes the seeds needed to derive a PDA for an enrollment account.

Hint 1: The enrollment PDA seeds are: `["enrollment", courseId, learnerPubkey]` (as Buffers).
Hint 2: Use `Buffer.from(str)` to convert a string seed and `learner.toBuffer()` for a PublicKey seed.
Hint 3: Return `{ seeds, count }` where `count` is the number of seeds and `seeds` is an array of their string representations.

tests.name: challenge

description.en: Master the core concepts of Solana: the account model, programs, transactions, and the runtime. No prior blockchain experience needed.
description.pt: Domine os conceitos centrais do Solana: modelo de contas, programas, transações e o runtime. Sem necessidade de experiência prévia em blockchain.
description.es: Domina los conceptos fundamentales de Solana: modelo de cuentas, programas, transacciones y el runtime. No se requiere experiencia previa en blockchain.

title: Solana Runtime Basics
description: Understand validators, slots, and how Solana executes transactions quickly. Complete the function to summarize a slot execution payload.
content:
Understand validators, slots, and how Solana executes transactions quickly. Complete the function to summarize a slot execution payload.

Hint 1: Return the slot number unchanged.
Hint 2: TPS estimate is txCount divided by seconds.
Hint 3: Mark healthy when finalized is true and TPS >= 1000.

tests.name: challenge

title: Accounts and Ownership
description: Programs can only mutate accounts they own. Implement a checker for writable account permissions.
content:
Programs can only mutate accounts they own. Implement a checker for writable account permissions.

Hint 1: Writable requires account.isWritable to be true.
Hint 2: Owner must match programId.
Hint 3: Return deniedReason when access is blocked.

tests.name: challenge

description.en: Explore the new Solana Token Extensions program: soulbound tokens, transfer hooks, confidential transfers, and more. Build the future of tokenized assets.
description.pt: Explore o novo programa Token Extensions do Solana: tokens soulbound, hooks de transferência, transferências confidenciais e mais. Construa o futuro dos ativos tokenizados.
description.es: Explora el nuevo programa Token Extensions de Solana: tokens soulbound, hooks de transferencia, transferencias confidenciales y más. Construye el futuro de los activos tokenizados.

title: Token-2022 Extensions
description: Token-2022 adds optional extensions like non-transferable tokens and transfer hooks. Build a helper that classifies enabled extensions.
content:
Token-2022 adds optional extensions like non-transferable tokens and transfer hooks. Build a helper that classifies enabled extensions.

Hint 1: Input has boolean flags: nonTransferable, transferHook, confidential.
Hint 2: Push extension names in order: NonTransferable, TransferHook, ConfidentialTransfer.
Hint 3: Return count equal to enabled array length.

tests.name: challenge

description.en: Build decentralized finance apps on Solana: AMMs, liquidity pools, SPL token swaps, and yield farming. Practical projects with on-chain programs.
description.pt: Construa aplicações de finanças descentralizadas no Solana: AMMs, pools de liquidez, trocas de tokens SPL e yield farming. Projetos práticos com programas on-chain.
description.es: Construye aplicaciones de finanzas descentralizadas en Solana: AMMs, pools de liquidez, swaps de tokens SPL y yield farming. Proyectos prácticos con programas on-chain.

title: AMM Price Impact Basics
description: In constant-product AMMs, larger trades move price more. Implement a simple price impact estimator.
content:
In constant-product AMMs, larger trades move price more. Implement a simple price impact estimator.

Hint 1: Use impactPct = (tradeSize / poolSize) * 100.
Hint 2: Round to 2 decimals.
Hint 3: High impact when impactPct >= 5.

tests.name: challenge
